convention: anthropics/skills/skill-creator evals.json — trigger-only fixture per references/schemas.md. Each entry carries `should_trigger` so skill-creator's description-optimisation loop can score train/held-out trigger accuracy.
notes: Three filters must hold to trigger: explicit pull, source-in-scope, not a sibling's job. Positives include all three. Negatives split between vocab-only (no source), wrong sibling, mid-edit (out of scope), and unrelated 'review' prompts.

evals.name: pull-review-cljs
evals.prompt: I just edited src/app/cart/events.cljs and src/app/cart/subs.cljs. Review them for re-frame2 anti-patterns.

evals.name: pull-audit-best
evals.prompt:
Audit this snippet against re-frame2 best practices:

(rf/reg-event-db :cart/loading? (fn [db [_ v]] (assoc db :cart/loading? v)))

evals.name: pull-any-improvements
evals.prompt: I read events.cljs and views.cljs earlier. Any improvements you can spot?

evals.name: pull-better-pattern
evals.prompt:
Is there a better re-frame2 pattern for this state machine?

(rf/reg-event-db :checkout/start ...)

evals.name: pull-improver-against
evals.prompt: Run the re-frame2 improver against the files I just edited.

evals.name: pull-critique-mode
evals.prompt: Critique my re-frame2 code — focus on subs.cljs and events.cljs in the cart slice.

evals.name: pull-snippet-paste
evals.prompt:
Quick review:

(rf/reg-sub :cart/items-loading? (fn [db _] (boolean (:cart/loading? db))))
(rf/reg-sub :cart/items-error? (fn [db _] (some? (:cart/error db))))
(rf/reg-sub :cart/items-loaded? (fn [db _] (some? (:cart/items db))))

Anything wrong?

evals.name: neg-vocab-no-source
evals.prompt: Any improvements I should make to my project?
evals.rationale: Vocabulary hit ('improvements') but no re-frame2 source in scope.

evals.name: neg-review-non-cljs
evals.prompt: Review my Python script for anti-patterns.

evals.name: neg-author-new
evals.prompt: Write me a re-frame2 reg-event-fx for posting a login form.
evals.rationale: Authoring new code is re-frame2's job.

evals.name: neg-live-pair
evals.prompt: Inspect app-db in my running shadow-cljs build.

evals.name: neg-greenfield
evals.prompt: Start me a new re-frame2 project from scratch.

evals.name: neg-mid-edit
evals.prompt: I'm in the middle of writing this reg-event-fx — interrupt me if I'm about to use an anti-pattern.
evals.rationale: Mid-edit interruption is explicitly disallowed; skill is pull-only.

evals.name: neg-pair-retro
evals.prompt: Retro on the re-frame2-pair session I just finished.

evals.name: neg-migration-review
evals.prompt: Review my v1->v2 migration so far — what's left?
